name: Brazos Turkey Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 red bell peppers, seeded and chopped
1 cup Ancho and New Mexico red chili paste
1 can (7 oz.) Chipotle peppers in Adobo sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat 3 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and garlic; sauté until translucent.
2. Stir in the cumin seeds and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
3. Add the red bell peppers, Polano peppers, Jalapenos, and Serranos. Cook until the peppers begin to soften, about 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the chili paste, chili powder, coriander, cinnamon, and black pepper. Cook for 5 more minutes.
5. Set aside the sautéed vegetables.
6. In a large pot or Dutch oven, brown the ground turkey over medium-high heat until no longer pink.
7. Add the chopped tomatoes with juice, chicken stock, and Mexican beer to the pot. Stir to combine.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 to 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Just before serving, stir in the grated unsweetened chocolate.
10. Garnish each serving with chopped green onion, cilantro, grated cheese, fried tortilla strips, and a dollop of sour cream.
11. Serve hot and enjoy! Makes 8 to 10 servings.
